creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sofian,

please approve of my committing this patch, or commit yourself.

This fixes the Version in the pkg-config file, which is currently "-"
rather than 1.2.8, breaking, for instance, the libpwmd build.

This fix is taken from the upstream repo, see
<http://git.libssh2.org/?p=libssh2.git;a=commitdiff;h=f0a37bdadc311b83fcb2ccafad4827016abe5d18;js=1>,
and can probably be reverted for future releases.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-version

Port maintainer (sbz@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
